creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://pdr2.bofh.network/data/140-diizzy/libxml2-libxslt/logs/errors/libsvg-0.1.4_11.log

The only user in tree is graphics/mapserver which will migrate to librsvg2 in PR 279897.

Given that its abandoned long ago along with graphics/libsvg-cairo I'd suggest that we sunset these ports
